answers.question: Does the school district have a policy sustainability?
answers.answer: Yes, the school district has a policy on sustainability as outlined in the Environmental Policy (0115). The policy includes promoting preservation of a safe environment, encouraging solid waste source reduction, supporting the collection and purchase of recyclables, effecting energy efficiency, and promoting the proper use and disposal of materials.

answers.question: Does the school district have a sustainability committee?
Does the school district have a comprehensive plan for sustainability?
